title: Clean up docstrings and tests
body:
* Add unittest for exists()
* Add remove() on Resource and/or Manager for each resource
* Create SwarmNotImplementedError() to reduce duplicated strings
* Refactor RESTful error handling to reduce duplicated code
* Improve docstring formatting
* Fix volume RESTful calls
* Add integration testing for volumes
* Fix platform keyword parsing
* Add missing method return types

Signed-off-by: Jhon Honce <jhonce@redhat.com>
